generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually taking advantage of our defense commitments? While we're spending billions on collective security, some partners are cutting their own defense budgets. It's time to rethink our alliance commitments and focus on protecting our own interests first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
